phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de presentes?

likely_response.local: A loja de presentes fica perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LAW-zhuh DIH preh-ZAYNG-tihsh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The gift shop is near the exit.

responses.english: The gift shop is near the exit.
responses.phonetic: AH LAW-zhuh DIH preh-ZAYNG-tihsh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.french: A loja de presentes fica perto da saída.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sacristia Dourada is
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Sacristia Dourada deste museu?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH suhk-reesh-TEEUH doow-RAH-duh DEHSH-tih moo-ZEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic sacristies in Portuguese museums are often preserved as original architectural features requiring quiet passage.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or a docent.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or a docent.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH.
responses.french: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um guia.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao bilheteiro para carimbar o seu bilhete.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo PUH-ruh kuh-reem-BAHR AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket seller to have your ticket stamped.

responses.english: Go to the ticket seller to have your ticket stamped.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo PUH-ruh kuh-reem-BAHR AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao bilheteiro para carimbar o seu bilhete.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete de entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih DIH ayngt-RAH-duh?

likely_response.local: Pode validar o seu bilhete na bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih vuh-lee-DAHR AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can validate your ticket at the ticket office.

responses.english: You can validate your ticket at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih vuh-lee-DAHR AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Pode validar o seu bilhete na bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cloister of São José is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Claustro de São José?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KLOWSHT-roo DIH SOWN zhoo-ZEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Cloisters in Azorean museums serve as quiet transitional spaces between exhibition halls and religious areas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sala de Azulejos is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala de Azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Sala de Azulejos is a tile room in the cloister; do not touch the tiles.

likely_response.translation_en: In the cloister, on the right.

responses.english: In the cloister, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sala de Azulejos is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala de Azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Azulejo exhibition rooms highlight traditional Portuguese tilework and typically enforce quiet observation.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket office or a docent.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket office or a docent.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH.
responses.french: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um guia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gift shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de lembranças perto da saída?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka a LO-zha jee lem-BRAN-sas PER-too da sa-EE-da?
phrases.cultural_note: Gift shops in Portuguese cultural venues are strategically placed near exits to manage visitor flow efficiently.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está junto à saída principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is right next to the main exit.

responses.english: Good morning, it is right next to the main exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, está junto à saída principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gift shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a loja de presentes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH LAW-zhuh DIH preh-ZAYNG-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese museums, gift shops are often placed near the exit to encourage last-minute purchases.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's near the exit.

responses.english: Good morning, it's near the exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, está perto da saída.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira para validar o seu bilhete.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket office to validate your ticket.

responses.english: Go to the ticket office to validate your ticket.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira para validar o seu bilhete.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to inquire about membership
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter informações sobre como me tornar sócio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih KOH-moo MIH too-ruh-NAHR SAWS-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museum staff prioritize efficiency and direct spatial references to maintain visitor flow.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pode informar-se na bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PAW-dih een-foo-ruh-MAHR-SIH NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, you can inquire at the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, you can inquire at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PAW-dih een-foo-ruh-MAHR-SIH NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, pode informar-se na bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Coleção de História Natural is
phrases.text_local: Como encontro a coleção de história natural?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo ayng-KOHNGT-roo AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH eesh-TAWR-yuh nuh-too-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Natural history collections in regional museums often occupy ground-level spaces for accessibility and climate control.
